title: Mad Particle
description: Make your world full of particles.
body:
## Description

疯狂粒子受Extinguish在Teacon 2022中的表现启发，是一个主要适用于多人游戏和数据包的模组。依靠粒子贴图的再利用而不是新增加，有几乎无穷多的粒子可供您营造各种场景。

MadParticle was inspired by Extinguish's performance at Teacon 2022. It is a mod primarily designed for multiplayer games and datapacks. Instead of adding new particles and textures, MadParticle relies on the reuse of vanilla particle textures, providing almost infinite particles for creating various scenes.

## GuideLines

`/madparticle`和`/mp`指令是这个模组中最重要的部分。在[Holo Janeway](https://holojaneway.uss-shenzhou.cn/madparticle)查看使用指南。

`/madparticle` and `/mp` command are the most important parts of this mod. You can check our guidelines at [Holo Janeway](https://holojaneway.uss-shenzhou.cn/en/madparticle).

## Version Selection

**小版本号**代表bug修补或是非关键功能添加。**中版本号**代表重大功能添加，不保证对已有指令的兼容性。

The **minor version number** represents bug fixes or non-critical feature additions. The **middle version number** represents significant feature additions, with no guarantee of compatibility with existing commands.
